judgment.summary: Rapidly growing, profitable company with strong cash flow but high valuation and leverage.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last quarter beat consensus by 6.3%; next earnings date is 2026-05-28.
positives: Earnings growth 170.8% YoY — exceptional profit expansion.
Free cash flow $836.12M TTM — strong cash generation.
Forward P/E 21.25x — attractive relative to trailing P/E and earnings growth.
Revenue growth 11.6% YoY — solid top-line expansion.
Consensus rating is 'buy' with a mean target of $100.44.
negatives: Trailing P/E 68.67x — valuation is very high on trailing earnings.
Debt/Equity 6.44 — significant leverage on the balance sheet.
Return on equity 3.5% — profitability on equity is low.
Analyst growth est, current Q: -0.8% — slight expected contraction in the current quarter.

news.paragraph: Barclays suggests Okta (OKTA) may raise its fiscal 2027 guidance, citing improved demand and execution. This positive outlook comes just ahead of the company's next earnings report, which could serve as a catalyst for a re-evaluation of its forward-looking statements. Traders should consider the potential for upward estimate revisions and how the market might price in stronger future performance.

headlines.title: Okta (OKTA) Could Raise Its Fiscal 2027 Guidance Amid Improved Demand And Execution, Says Barclays
